datasets.name: 35341dc1
queryLines:
SELECT 'ALL' AS policy_id, 'ALL' AS policy_name
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT t.policy_id, COALESCE(pn.policy_name, t.policy_id) AS policy_name
FROM hurcy.default.instance_workload_profiles_mv AS t
LEFT JOIN hurcy.default.cluster_policy_names AS pn
  ON t.policy_id = pn.policy_id
WHERE t.policy_id IS NOT NULL

datasets.name: 0d52ef71
queryLines:
-- #####################################################################
-- 대시보드 데이터셋 쿼리
-- #####################################################################
-- 아래 쿼리들은 파이프라인 외부(Lakeview 대시보드)에서 실행한다.
-- MV가 파이프라인 target catalog/schema에 배포된 후,
-- 대시보드에서 전체 경로(예: hurcy.default.instance_workload_profiles_mv)로
-- 참조한다.
--
-- Dashboard Parameters:
--   :start_date  - 조회 시작일 (DATE)
--   :end_date    - 조회 종료일 (DATE)
--   :policy_id   - 클러스터 정책 ID 필터 (MULTI STRING)
-- #####################################################################


-- =====================================================================
-- 대시보드 1: 클러스터 워크로드 프로파일 개요
-- =====================================================================
-- 클러스터 단위 집계: 워크로드 프로파일별 활용률, 실행시간.
-- 대시보드 "Cluster profiles" 페이지용 데이터셋.
-- =====================================================================

SELECT
  c.workspace_id,
  c.cluster_id,
  c.cluster_name,
  c.cluster_source,
  c.workload_profile,
  c.policy_id,
  pn.policy_name,
  c.owned_by,
  c.worker_node_type,
  c.configured_workers,
  c.min_autoscale_workers,
  c.max_autoscale_workers,
  c.dbr_version,

  MIN(c.instance_start_time)                          AS cluster_start_time,
  MAX(c.instance_end_time)                            AS cluster_end_time,
  DATEDIFF(MINUTE, MIN(c.instance_start_time),
                   MAX(c.instance_end_time))          AS cluster_execution_minutes,

  ROUND(AVG(c.avg_node_count), 2)                     AS avg_node_count_per_minute,
  ROUND(MAX(c.max_node_count), 2)                     AS max_node_count_per_minute,

  ROUND(AVG(c.avg_cpu_util), 2)                        AS avg_cpu_util_per_cluster,
  ROUND(AVG(c.median_cpu_util), 2)                    AS median_cpu_per_cluster,
  ROUND(MAX(c.max_cpu_util), 2)                        AS max_cpu_util_per_cluster,
  ROUND(AVG(c.stddev_cpu_util), 2)                    AS avg_stddev_cpu,
  ROUND(AVG(c.avg_cpu_wait), 2)                        AS avg_cpu_wait_per_cluster,
  ROUND(MAX(c.max_cpu_wait), 2)                        AS max_cpu_wait_per_cluster,
  ROUND(AVG(c.avg_mem_util), 2)                        AS avg_mem_util_per_cluster,
  ROUND(AVG(c.median_mem_util), 2)                    AS median_mem_per_cluster,
  ROUND(MAX(c.max_mem_util), 2)                        AS max_mem_util_per_cluster,
  ROUND(AVG(c.stddev_mem_util), 2)                    AS avg_stddev_mem,
  ROUND(AVG(c.avg_net_mb_rec_minute), 2)               AS avg_net_mb_rec_minute_per_cluster,
  ROUND(AVG(c.avg_net_mb_sent_minute), 2)              AS avg_net_mb_sent_minute_per_cluster,

  -- sizing_signal: Right Sizing 페이지와 동일 기준
  CASE
    WHEN AVG(c.median_cpu_util) < 30 AND AVG(c.median_mem_util) < 40
     AND (AVG(c.stddev_cpu_util) > 20 OR MAX(c.max_cpu_util) > 80
      OR  AVG(c.stddev_mem_util) > 20 OR MAX(c.max_mem_util) > 80)
      THEN 'BURST_PATTERN'
    WHEN PERCENTILE_APPROX(c.avg_cpu_util, 0.95) < 20
     AND PERCENTILE_APPROX(c.avg_mem_util, 0.95) < 30
     AND AVG(c.median_cpu_util) < 15 AND AVG(c.stddev_cpu_util) < 15
      THEN 'DEFINITE_DOWNSIZE'
    WHEN AVG(c.avg_cpu_util) < 30 AND AVG(c.avg_mem_util) < 40
     AND AVG(c.median_cpu_util) < 25 AND AVG(c.median_mem_util) < 35
      THEN 'LIKELY_DOWNSIZE'
    WHEN PERCENTILE_APPROX(c.avg_cpu_util, 0.95) > 85
      OR PERCENTILE_APPROX(c.avg_mem_util, 0.95) > 85
      THEN 'CONSIDER_UPSIZE'
    WHEN AVG(c.avg_cpu_wait) > 10
      THEN 'IO_BOTTLENECK'
    ELSE 'APPROPRIATE'
  END AS sizing_signal
FROM hurcy.default.instance_workload_profiles_mv AS c
LEFT JOIN hurcy.default.cluster_policy_names AS pn
  ON c.policy_id = pn.policy_id
WHERE 
   c.instance_start_time >= :start_date
   AND c.instance_end_time   <  :end_date
  AND (
    :policy_id is null
    OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:policy_id, c.policy_id)
  )
GROUP BY
  c.workspace_id,
  c.cluster_id,
  c.cluster_name,
  c.cluster_source,
  c.workload_profile,
  c.policy_id,
  pn.policy_name,
  c.owned_by,
  c.worker_node_type,
  c.configured_workers,
  c.min_autoscale_workers,
  c.max_autoscale_workers,
  c.dbr_version
ORDER BY
  workload_profile DESC,
  cluster_execution_minutes DESC;

datasets.name: 080e18ac
queryLines:
-- =====================================================================
-- 대시보드 2: 잡 클러스터 워크로드 프로파일 상세
-- =====================================================================
-- 잡 실행 단위로 인스턴스별 활용률, 메트릭 임계치를 보여준다.
-- 대시보드 "Instance profile" 페이지용 데이터셋.
-- =====================================================================

SELECT
  tr.job_id,
  tr.job_name,
  tr.job_run_id,
  tr.period_start_time,
  tr.period_end_time,
  tr.job_run_duration_minutes,
  tr.workload_profile,
  tr.policy_id,
  tr.cluster_id,
  tr.cluster_name,
  tr.cluster_source,
  tr.instance_id,
  tr.driver,
  tr.node_type,
  tr.instance_start_time,
  tr.instance_end_time,

  tr.avg_node_count,
  tr.max_node_count,
  tr.stddev_node_count,

  tr.avg_cpu_util,
  tr.max_cpu_util,
  tr.avg_cpu_wait,
  tr.max_cpu_wait,
  tr.avg_mem_util,
  tr.max_mem_util,
  tr.avg_net_mb_rec_minute,
  tr.avg_net_mb_sent_minute,

  CASE
    WHEN tr.avg_cpu_util < 30  THEN 'cpu_low_threshold (<30%)'
    WHEN tr.avg_cpu_util <= 60 THEN 'cpu_mid_threshold (<=60%)'
    WHEN tr.avg_cpu_util > 60  THEN 'cpu_high_threshold (>60%)'
  END AS cpu_metric_level,
  CASE
    WHEN tr.avg_mem_util < 40  THEN 'mem_low_threshold (<40%)'
    WHEN tr.avg_mem_util <= 60 THEN 'mem_mid_threshold (<=60%)'
    WHEN tr.avg_mem_util > 60  THEN 'mem_high_threshold (>60%)'
  END AS mem_metric_level
FROM hurcy.default.instance_workload_profiles_mv AS tr
WHERE tr.period_start_time >= :start_date
  AND tr.period_end_time   <  :end_date
  AND (
    :policy_id is null
    OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:policy_id, tr.policy_id)
  )
ORDER BY
  workload_profile DESC,
  job_run_duration_minutes DESC;

datasets.name: 2b3cbec0
queryLines:
-- =====================================================================
-- 대시보드 3: 라이트사이징 권고
-- =====================================================================
-- 클러스터별 활용률을 집계하고, 자동화된 사이징 분류와 예상 절감액을
-- 제시한다. 비용은 job_run_cost_profiles_mv에서 조인한다.
-- =====================================================================

WITH cluster_util AS (
  SELECT
    workspace_id,
    cluster_id,
    cluster_name,
    cluster_source,
    owned_by,
    worker_node_type,
    configured_workers,
    min_autoscale_workers,
    max_autoscale_workers,
    dbr_version,
    policy_id,
    workload_profile,

    ROUND(AVG(avg_cpu_util), 2)                        AS avg_cpu_percent,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(avg_cpu_util, 0.95), 2)    AS p95_cpu_percent,
    ROUND(MAX(max_cpu_util), 2)                        AS max_cpu_percent,
    ROUND(AVG(avg_mem_util), 2)                        AS avg_mem_percent,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(avg_mem_util, 0.95), 2)    AS p95_mem_percent,
    ROUND(MAX(max_mem_util), 2)                        AS max_mem_percent,
    ROUND(AVG(avg_cpu_wait), 2)                        AS avg_cpu_wait_percent,
    ROUND(AVG(avg_net_mb_rec_minute), 2)               AS avg_net_mb_rec,
    ROUND(AVG(avg_net_mb_sent_minute), 2)              AS avg_net_mb_sent,

    ROUND(AVG(avg_node_count), 2)                      AS avg_node_count,
    ROUND(MAX(max_node_count), 2)                      AS max_node_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT instance_id)                        AS total_instances,
    COUNT(DISTINCT job_id)                             AS distinct_job_count
  FROM hurcy.default.instance_workload_profiles_mv
  WHERE instance_start_time >= :start_date
    AND instance_end_time   <  :end_date
    AND (
      :policy_id is null
      OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:policy_id, policy_id)
    )
  GROUP BY
    workspace_id, cluster_id, cluster_name, cluster_source,
    owned_by, worker_node_type, configured_workers,
    min_autoscale_workers, max_autoscale_workers,
    dbr_version, policy_id, workload_profile
),
cluster_cost AS (
  SELECT
    workspace_id,
    cluster_id,
    ROUND(SUM(total_dbus), 4)      AS total_dbus,
    ROUND(SUM(total_cost_usd), 2)  AS total_cost_usd
  FROM hurcy.default.job_run_cost_profiles_mv
  WHERE run_start_time >= :start_date
    AND run_end_time   <  :end_date
    AND (
      :policy_id is null
      OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:policy_id, policy_id)
    )
  GROUP BY workspace_id, cluster_id
),
cluster_summary AS (
  SELECT
    cu.*,
    COALESCE(cc.total_dbus, 0)     AS total_dbus,
    COALESCE(cc.total_cost_usd, 0) AS total_cost_usd
  FROM cluster_util cu
  LEFT JOIN cluster_cost cc
    ON cu.workspace_id = cc.workspace_id
    AND cu.cluster_id  = cc.cluster_id
)

SELECT
  *,

  CASE
    WHEN p95_cpu_percent < 20 AND p95_mem_percent < 30
      THEN 'STRONGLY_OVERSIZED'
    WHEN avg_cpu_percent < 30 AND avg_mem_percent < 40
      THEN 'POTENTIALLY_OVERSIZED'
    WHEN p95_cpu_percent > 90 OR p95_mem_percent > 90
      THEN 'POTENTIALLY_UNDERSIZED'
    WHEN avg_cpu_wait_percent > 10
      THEN 'IO_BOTTLENECK'
    ELSE 'APPROPRIATE'
  END AS sizing_signal,

  CASE
    WHEN p95_cpu_percent < 20 AND p95_mem_percent < 30
      THEN 'P95 CPU/Memory 모두 매우 낮음. 노드 타입 축소 또는 워커 수 감소를 강력 권고.'
    WHEN avg_cpu_percent < 30 AND avg_mem_percent < 40
      THEN '평균 CPU/Memory 낮음. 더 작은 구성으로 전환 검토 필요.'
    WHEN p95_cpu_percent > 90 OR p95_mem_percent > 90
      THEN 'P95 리소스 사용률이 한계에 근접. 노드 타입 확대 또는 워커 추가 검토.'
    WHEN avg_cpu_wait_percent > 10
      THEN 'CPU I/O 대기가 높음. 스토리지 최적화 또는 디스크 성능 개선 권고.'
    ELSE '현재 사이징이 워크로드에 적합함.'
  END AS recommendation,

  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN avg_cpu_percent < 30 AND avg_mem_percent < 40
        THEN total_cost_usd * (1.0 - GREATEST(avg_cpu_percent, avg_mem_percent) / 100.0) * 0.5
      ELSE 0
    END, 2
  ) AS estimated_savings_usd

FROM cluster_summary
ORDER BY total_cost_usd DESC;

datasets.name: a1b2c3d4
queryLines:
-- =====================================================================
-- Job Run 별 비용 프로파일
-- =====================================================================
-- job_run_cost_profiles_mv에서 직접 조회.
-- (cluster_id, job_id, job_run_id) 수준으로 비용이 정확하게 집계되어 있다.
-- =====================================================================

SELECT
  workspace_id,
  is_serverless,
  cluster_id,
  cluster_name,
  cluster_source,
  owned_by,
  worker_node_type,
  configured_workers,
  min_autoscale_workers,
  max_autoscale_workers,
  dbr_version,
  policy_id,
  job_id,
  job_name,
  run_as,
  creator_id,
  job_run_id,
  run_start_time,
  run_end_time,
  run_duration_minutes,
  task_count,
  instance_count,
  avg_cpu_util,
  max_cpu_util,
  avg_cpu_wait,
  avg_mem_util,
  max_mem_util,
  avg_net_mb_rec_minute,
  avg_net_mb_sent_minute,
  total_dbus,
  total_cost_usd
FROM hurcy.default.job_run_cost_profiles_mv
WHERE run_start_time >= :start_date
  AND run_end_time   <  :end_date
  AND (
    :policy_id is null
    OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:policy_id, policy_id)
  )
ORDER BY total_cost_usd DESC

datasets.name: b5c6d7e8
queryLines:
-- =====================================================================
-- Right Sizing 대상 식별 (Classic Compute Only)
-- =====================================================================
-- right_sizing_targets_mv에서 직접 조회.
-- Job × Cluster 단위로 반복 실행 패턴 기반 sizing 판정.
-- =====================================================================

SELECT
  workspace_id,
  job_id,
  job_name,
  cluster_id,
  cluster_name,
  cluster_source,
  compute_type,
  owned_by,
  worker_node_type,
  configured_workers,
  min_autoscale_workers,
  max_autoscale_workers,
  dbr_version,
  policy_id,
  run_count,
  avg_run_duration_minutes,
  stddev_run_duration_minutes,
  avg_cpu_util,
  p95_cpu_util,
  peak_cpu_util,
  avg_mem_util,
  p95_mem_util,
  peak_mem_util,
  avg_cpu_wait,
  avg_instance_count,
  total_dbus,
  total_cost_usd,
  sizing_recommendation,
  recommendation_detail,
  estimated_savings_usd
FROM hurcy.default.right_sizing_targets_mv
WHERE (
  :policy_id IS NULL
  OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:policy_id, policy_id)
)
ORDER BY
  CASE sizing_recommendation
    WHEN 'DEFINITE_DOWNSIZE' THEN 1
    WHEN 'LIKELY_DOWNSIZE' THEN 2
    WHEN 'IO_BOTTLENECK' THEN 3
    WHEN 'CONSIDER_UPSIZE' THEN 4
    ELSE 5
  END,
  estimated_savings_usd DESC

lines: # Monitor Job cluster utilization and adjust job cluster policy.

frame.title: Cluster workload profile distribution per policy_id except policy_id is null
Cost by Compute Type (Serverless vs Classic)

lines: Classic compute (All-Purpose / Job Compute) 중 반복 실행(3회+) 패턴 기반으로 확실히 줄일 수 있는 대상을 식별합니다. Serverless는 자동 리소스 관리이므로 분석 대상에서 제외됩니다.

frame.title: Top Jobs by Estimated Savings (Downsize Targets)
Cost by Compute Type & Sizing Recommendation
